gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands comfortably and gestures toward the screen while inviting attention to the two groups of objects.
a tutor leans slightly forward with a welcoming smile, encouraging the learners to start counting objects aloud.
a tutor steps to the side, extends both arms wide, and invites everyone to visualize combining the two groups.
a tutor holds one hand out with three fingers raised and the other hand showing two fingers while explaining the groups.
a tutor raises both hands above their head, bringing them together while celebrating the total of five objects.
a tutor takes a step back and gestures with both hands toward imaginary new groups, inviting the class to join.
a tutor holds one hand with four fingers extended while using the other hand to show three fingers, emphasizing each group.
a tutor smiles brightly and holds both hands up, encouraging the learners to count together while celebrating their effort.
a tutor claps their hands lightly, stepping forward slightly to express excitement about combining groups successfully.
a tutor gestures with open palms toward the class with an encouraging nod, inviting them to continue practicing addition.
